_notes.managers: PUBLIC REPO: placeholder names only. Put the real 26/27 roster in a gitignored league.config.local.json (same shape) on the machine running the draft; it is deep-merged over this file at runtime (arrays replace wholesale). Manager count derives from the array length.
_notes.budget: Auction dollars per manager for the whole draft.
_notes.squad: Slots per position each manager must fill; squad size derives from the sum. Position keys map to FPL element_type: GK=1, DEF=2, MID=3, FWD=4.
_notes.tiers: Ordered highest minFplPrice first. A player's tier is the first band whose minFplPrice <= the player's FPL price; the last band must have minFplPrice 0 so every player lands somewhere. openBid is the minimum opening bid for that tier; the lowest tier's openBid is the league-wide reserve (min open). A tier with phase2Only:true is never offered in phase 1 - its players are bid for by nomination in phase 2 only (Tier 5, the $1 cheap band).
_notes.bidIncrement: null = voice bidding, no enforced increment in v1. Set a number to enforce a minimum raise.
_notes.valueBadgeThreshold: FALLBACK ONLY (#70): the steal/fair/overpay band is normally calibrated on draft morning by the valuations job (valueBandPct of the day's median valuation, written to valuation_meta). This fixed dollar band is used only when that job has not run, so the reveal never breaks - the AI must never block the auction.
_notes.valueBandPct: Reveal band as a fraction of the day's median valuation (#70). The valuations job multiplies the median by this, floors it at the minimum opening bid, and stores the result as the calibrated FAIR band. Override per run with --band-pct.
_notes.scarcityThreshold: Board alert when the remaining pool for a position drops to this many players per unfilled slot.
_notes.scarcityTiers: Which tier numbers raise scarcity alerts on the board. Default [1, 2]: only premium stock shouts; add lower tiers here to alert on them too.
_notes.pollMs: How often every surface re-fetches /api/state, in milliseconds.
_notes.revealMs: How long the TV reveal (sealed valuation at the hammer) stays on screen, in milliseconds.
_notes.removed: bidFloor/increment/multipick/rebidRounds/scoringSource were dropped from this shape. Rebid rounds are deferred to v2; season scoring lives on the official FPL Draft site, not here.
